name: Crab Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crabmeat, margarine, cheese, garlic salt, mayonnaise, and season salt in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Spread the mixture evenly on top of the English muffins.
4. Cut each muffin into quarters.
5. Place the cut muffins onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
6. Freeze them for about an hour until solid.
7. Transfer the frozen muffins to a resealable plastic bag and store in the freezer until ready to use.
8. When you're ready to serve, preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C) and broil for about 5 minutes or until heated through.
